text: Time dilation - shoots a beam that slows down the enemy.
Acceleration of time - gives a strong speed effect to the player.
Stopping time - stops the enemy completely for some time.
$(o)Condition:$() Remaining duration of Time Master effect ≤50% of original.
Accelerated Rhythm: +50% damage; 20% chance to gain "Dash III" for 5 sec on attack.
Countdown: 25% chance to apply "Timer" for 3 sec; killing a marked target restores 100% health.
